title: The Road to Sabaody: Rising Conflict
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #12, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #2 as the scene develops across pages 5–8.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #12, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: If you're satisfied, then that's fine.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Maybe a white horse would be nice.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's a little awkward, but I accept

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I'm sorry for causing you trouble!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Let's go!!! Rose- colored life riders!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: It certainly was a pleasant afternoon, master.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I wish I had another six arms...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: UFUFOU, good work, Hachin! Everyone looks stuffed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You can have tea up here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: This is the course we should take.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We're heading for the "Shabondy archipelago," right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yeah, even a submarine couldn't make it...

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Unknown person #12, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #3, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: rising conflict.
